name: XSPRAY PHARMA AB
summary: Xspray Pharma AB is a pharmaceutical company developing enhanced versions of approved pharmaceutical products, primarily Protein Kinase Inhibitors (PKIs) for cancer treatment, using its HyNap technology. The company aims to improve the solubility and bioavailability of existing drugs, leading to better patient outcomes. Xspray Pharma is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
